Title: OTI Corp Inventory License - Valid License Grants Access to Inventory Functionality

Step Action: Log in to OT Integrity Corp as an Admin user.
Step Expected: Admin dashboard is displayed successfully.

Step Action: Confirm that a valid OTI Corp Inventory license is installed and active in the licensing interface.
Step Expected: Valid Inventory license is shown as active with a valid expiration date or perpetual status.

Step Action: Navigate to the Inventory functionality section of the application.
Step Expected: Inventory module is accessible and fully loaded.

Step Action: Verify that all Inventory features and capabilities are available to licensed users.
Step Expected: All Inventory features are enabled and users can interact with Inventory functionality without restriction.

Step Action: Successfully verified that a valid OTI Corp Inventory license grants full access to Inventory functionality.

Title: OTI Corp Inventory License - License Valid for Minimum Duration of One Month

Step Action: Log in to OT Integrity Corp as an Admin user.
Step Expected: Admin dashboard is displayed successfully.

Step Action: Navigate to the licensing interface.
Step Expected: Licensing interface is displayed.

Step Action: Apply or confirm an Inventory license with a duration of exactly 1 month.
Step Expected: License is accepted and shows a valid expiration date of 1 month from the activation date.

Step Action: Navigate to Inventory functionality.
Step Expected: Inventory module is accessible.

Step Action: Verify that Inventory features are fully available for the duration of the 1-month license.
Step Expected: All Inventory capabilities are accessible and functional.

Step Action: Successfully verified that a 1-month Inventory license is the minimum valid license duration and grants access to Inventory functionality.

Title: OTI Corp Inventory License - Perpetual License Grants Ongoing Access to Inventory Functionality

Step Action: Log in to OT Integrity Corp as an Admin user.
Step Expected: Admin dashboard is displayed successfully.

Step Action: Navigate to the licensing interface.
Step Expected: Licensing interface is displayed.

Step Action: Apply or confirm a perpetual Inventory license.
Step Expected: License is accepted and displayed as perpetual with no expiration date.

Step Action: Navigate to the Inventory functionality section.
Step Expected: Inventory module is accessible.

Step Action: Verify that Inventory features remain available without an expiration restriction.
Step Expected: All Inventory capabilities are accessible and no expiration warning is shown.

Step Action: Successfully verified that a perpetual Inventory license grants ongoing unlimited access to Inventory functionality.

Title: OTI Corp Inventory License - Expired License Prevents Access but Allows Admin to Reach Licensing Interface

Step Action: Log in to OT Integrity Corp as an Admin user.
Step Expected: Admin dashboard is displayed successfully.

Step Action: Simulate or confirm that the Inventory license is expired.
Step Expected: Licensing interface or system indicates the license is expired.

Step Action: Attempt to navigate to the Inventory functionality section.
Step Expected: Access to Inventory functionality is denied and an appropriate message is displayed indicating no valid license.

Step Action: Verify the Admin is able to navigate to the licensing interface from the denied access state.
Step Expected: Admin is redirected to or can access the licensing interface to resolve the licensing issue.

Step Action: Successfully verified that an expired Inventory license blocks Inventory access and allows the Admin to reach the licensing interface to troubleshoot.

Title: OTI Corp Inventory License - Corrupted License Prevents Access but Allows Admin to Reach Licensing Interface

Step Action: Log in to OT Integrity Corp as an Admin user.
Step Expected: Admin dashboard is displayed successfully.

Step Action: Simulate or confirm a corrupted Inventory license state.
Step Expected: Licensing interface or system indicates the license is corrupted or invalid.

Step Action: Attempt to navigate to the Inventory functionality section.
Step Expected: Access to Inventory functionality is denied with an appropriate message indicating a corrupted or invalid license.

Step Action: Verify the Admin is able to navigate to the licensing interface from the denied access state.
Step Expected: Admin can access the licensing interface to troubleshoot the corrupted license.

Step Action: Successfully verified that a corrupted Inventory license blocks access to Inventory functionality and allows the Admin to reach the licensing interface.

Title: OTI Corp Inventory License - Missing License Prevents Access but Allows Admin to Reach Licensing Interface

Step Action: Log in to OT Integrity Corp as an Admin user.
Step Expected: Admin dashboard is displayed successfully.

Step Action: Confirm that no Inventory license is installed or the license file is unavailable.
Step Expected: Licensing interface shows no valid Inventory license.

Step Action: Attempt to navigate to the Inventory functionality section.
Step Expected: Access to Inventory functionality is denied with an appropriate message indicating no license is available.

Step Action: Verify the Admin can navigate to the licensing interface to troubleshoot.
Step Expected: Admin can access the licensing interface without obstruction.

Step Action: Successfully verified that the absence of an Inventory license blocks Inventory access and directs the Admin to the licensing interface.

Title: OTI Corp Inventory License - Expired License Stops Data Import from Site to Corp

Step Action: Log in to OT Integrity Corp as an Admin user.
Step Expected: Admin dashboard is displayed successfully.

Step Action: Confirm that a data import from site to corp is configured and operational.
Step Expected: Data imports are running successfully under a valid license.

Step Action: Simulate or confirm that the Inventory license has expired.
Step Expected: System indicates the Inventory license is no longer valid.

Step Action: Trigger or wait for the next scheduled data import from site to corp.
Step Expected: Data import does not execute.

Step Action: Verify that data import processing is halted and no new data is imported while the license is expired.
Step Expected: No data import activity occurs; system logs or UI confirm import is suspended due to invalid license.

Step Action: Successfully verified that an expired Inventory license prevents data imports from site to corp and halts data processing.

Title: OTI Corp Inventory License - Corrupted License Stops Data Import from Site to Corp

Step Action: Log in to OT Integrity Corp as an Admin user.
Step Expected: Admin dashboard is displayed successfully.

Step Action: Confirm that a data import from site to corp is configured and operational.
Step Expected: Data imports are running successfully under a valid license.

Step Action: Simulate or confirm that the Inventory license has become corrupted.
Step Expected: System indicates the Inventory license is corrupted or invalid.

Step Action: Trigger or wait for the next scheduled data import from site to corp.
Step Expected: Data import does not execute.

Step Action: Verify that data processing is halted and no data is imported from site to corp while the license is corrupted.
Step Expected: No data import activity occurs; system logs or UI confirm import is suspended due to corrupted license.

Step Action: Successfully verified that a corrupted Inventory license prevents data imports from site to corp and halts all data processing.

Title: OTI Corp Inventory License - Unavailable License Stops Data Import from Site to Corp

Step Action: Log in to OT Integrity Corp as an Admin user.
Step Expected: Admin dashboard is displayed successfully.

Step Action: Confirm that a data import from site to corp is configured and operational.
Step Expected: Data imports are running successfully under a valid license.

Step Action: Remove or make the Inventory license unavailable.
Step Expected: System detects that no valid Inventory license is present.

Step Action: Trigger or wait for the next scheduled data import from site to corp.
Step Expected: Data import does not execute.

Step Action: Verify that data import processing is halted and no data is imported while the license is unavailable.
Step Expected: No data import activity occurs; system logs or UI confirm import is suspended due to unavailable license.

Step Action: Successfully verified that an unavailable Inventory license prevents data imports from site to corp and halts data processing.

Title: OTI Corp Inventory License - Help Topic Content is Available

Step Action: Log in to OT Integrity Corp as an Admin user.
Step Expected: Admin dashboard is displayed successfully.

Step Action: Navigate to the Help section or click the Help icon within the application.
Step Expected: Help section is accessible.

Step Action: Search or browse for help topics related to Inventory licensing.
Step Expected: Inventory licensing help topics are listed and available.

Step Action: Open a help topic related to Inventory licensing.
Step Expected: Help topic content is displayed and is relevant to Inventory licensing.

Step Action: Verify that the help topic covers key licensing information such as how to apply a license and how to troubleshoot licensing issues.
Step Expected: Help content provides clear and accurate guidance on Inventory licensing.

Step Action: Successfully verified that help topic content for OTI Corp Inventory licensing has been created and is accessible within the application.

Title: OTI Corp Inventory License - Non-Admin User Cannot Access Licensing Interface

Step Action: Log in to OT Integrity Corp as a non-admin user.
Step Expected: User dashboard is displayed.

Step Action: Attempt to navigate to the licensing interface.
Step Expected: Access to the licensing interface is denied and an appropriate message is displayed.

Step Action: Verify that no licensing configuration options are visible or accessible to the non-admin user.
Step Expected: Licensing interface and controls are not available to non-admin users.

Step Action: Successfully verified that non-admin users cannot access the Inventory licensing interface.

Title: OTI Corp Inventory License - License with Invalid Format is Rejected

Step Action: Log in to OT Integrity Corp as an Admin user.
Step Expected: Admin dashboard is displayed successfully.

Step Action: Navigate to the licensing interface.
Step Expected: Licensing interface is displayed.

Step Action: Attempt to apply a license file or key with an invalid format (e.g. wrong file type or malformed key).
Step Expected: License submission is attempted.

Step Action: Submit the invalid license.
Step Expected: System rejects the license and displays an appropriate error message indicating the license is invalid or malformed.

Step Action: Verify that Inventory functionality remains inaccessible after submitting the invalid license.
Step Expected: Inventory functionality is still blocked.

Step Action: Successfully verified that an invalid license format is rejected and does not grant access to Inventory functionality.

Title: OTI Corp Inventory License - License for Different Product Does Not Grant Inventory Access

Step Action: Log in to OT Integrity Corp as an Admin user.
Step Expected: Admin dashboard is displayed successfully.

Step Action: Navigate to the licensing interface.
Step Expected: Licensing interface is displayed.

Step Action: Apply a valid license that is for a different OTI product or module (not Inventory).
Step Expected: License is applied.

Step Action: Navigate to the Inventory functionality section.
Step Expected: Access to Inventory is denied.

Step Action: Verify that a non-Inventory license does not enable Inventory capabilities.
Step Expected: Inventory features remain inaccessible; an appropriate message indicates a valid Inventory license is required.

Step Action: Successfully verified that only a valid OTI Corp Inventory-specific license enables access to Inventory functionality.
